chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-2578 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on office objection 1 & 2 2. For order on CMA No.11961/2025 3. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Usman Tufail Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.3. M/s. Ashraf Ali Butt and Rehmat ul Nisa, Advocate for Respondent No.4. --------------- Learned counsel submits that this Petition has become infructuous as subsequent events have overtaken the matter, with the Petitioner having thus filed another Petition bearing C.P No. D- 4437/2025. Hence, this Petition is not being pressed any further. The same stand dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
